message:
chore(tests): add proptest regression seeds for property-based region ops tests

Add proptest shrunk failure seeds so all developers and CI automatically
re-run these previously-discovered edge cases before generating new random
inputs. Per proptest best practices, these files should be checked in to
source control.

tests/property_region_ops.proptest-regressions:
- 5 shrunk seed hashes covering: deep nesting depth=1, advance-time + cancel
  interaction, cancel on invalid region selector, close-then-cancel sequence,
  and cancel with User reason

tests/regressions/region_ops/:
- 11 JSON failure case files from two proptest runs (timestamps 1774198888
  and 1774198889) covering: cancellation_propagates_to_children,
  deep_nesting_maintains_invariants, full_lifecycle_preserves_invariants
  (build and teardown phases), invariants_maintained_under_stress, and
  random_ops_no_panic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 8e381a47e020fccdd9cbdb227736deb1ee154e1e6726febcf08cc675f6b38d90 # shrinks to depth = 1
+cc 56c644c7c57ee8967b7f589a2d88b0c487a20bc895e61e3aa9f1d35e9693c71c # shrinks to setup_ops = [AdvanceTime { millis: 4760 }], cancel_target = RegionSelector(0)
+cc 62fe3cacd7d69c46c06728c61315d979aac224a0220ad06baed2efdd90ce5d9a # shrinks to ops = [Cancel { region: RegionSelector(77), reason: Shutdown }]
+cc 456a6504f37626184d7bd1774312abff0c110df2e4bd9f39863a54dab90bc8b8 # shrinks to create_ops = [CloseRegion { region: RegionSelector(17) }], destroy_ops = [Cancel { region: RegionSelector(50), reason: Deadline }]
+cc d8c5b3af1fd10b9f8ed409603b5a82f27968fef34c46b64b713ab5a48fb495aa # shrinks to ops = [Cancel { region: RegionSelector(93), reason: User }]
